title: Checkpoint: the request frame
pedagogy: Checkpoint over sent-01 material: the ขอ + thing + หน่อย + ครับ/ค่ะ request frame recombined across every sentence-phase exercise type — cloze (content + particle slots), listening comprehension (meaning + transcript), build, and word recall. Nothing new is taught; the engine appends due-card callbacks from earlier units and weak-tone drills at runtime. Pass = 80% accuracy; a failed run still updates SRS.

exercises.meaning: Could I get some water, please? (female speaker)
exercises.explanation: The thing you want follows ขอ — here it's water. ข้าว would order rice; กิน is a verb and doesn't fit the slot.
กิน stays flat on the mid tone; เอา opens on a bare vowel and ขอ rises. The opener carries the meaning.

exercises.meaning: Could I get some water, please? (male speaker)
exercises.gloss: ask-for + water + softener + male polite particle
exercises.explanation: ขอ + น้ำ + หน่อย + ครับ — the frame, assembled without a prompt to lean on.
Same น้ำ every time — only the opener changes. เอา starts on the vowel, no consonant attack at all.

exercises.meaning: Could I get some rice, please? (male speaker)
exercises.explanation: Rice this time — ข้าว in the slot. น้ำ would order water; อร่อย describes food, it can't be ordered.
